name: ai-powered-e-channeling-root
description: Root project for AI-Powered E-Channeling (my-app branch)

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix apps/backend" "npm run dev --prefix apps/web"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix apps/backend" "npm run dev --prefix apps/web" "npm start --prefix apps/mobile"
scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix apps/backend && npm install --prefix apps/web && npm install --prefix apps/mobile
